channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 9th June
item.description:
Damaged tree branches from large dead branch. Making safe with FW Closure. Please pass on to relevant AHR to contact ARBS team to get tree cut.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 9th June
item.description:
Customer is reporting that the kerbs are uneven outside of the church. Several people have fallen and are a trip hazard.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Soft Floor Damaged - Play Area, 9th June
item.description:
In the play area in the park at the bottom of Paygrove Lane, soft floor to the side of the slide has been damaged - not sure if wear & tear or vandalism. I found a chunk of it out on the grass near the brook.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Walk, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 9th June
item.description:
15DB Overgrown Tree CW Road Closure TM Remove Lower Branches (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 9th June
item.description:
15DB Overgrown Tree CW Road Closure TM Remove Lower Branches (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 9th June
item.description:
Debris FW ENWD x No Parking Sign Give and take TM COLLECT AND RETURN TO DEPOT, ENQUIRY RAISED FOR AHR TO ARRANGE REINSTATEMENT (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 9th June
item.description:
No parking sign left on FW, please pass on to relevant AHR to arrange reinstatement. Unable to locate where its come from pointed out by scaffold crew working on Boots. Arranging for it to be collected and returned to depot.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Unstable Slab FW 1 x 600mm x 450mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required Permanent Repair (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow tree has fallen - no danger to life, 9th June
item.description:
What three words belts.ringside.visits (approximately their map isn’t clear). White willow has fallen. It did have a flag on it so I suspect it had been anticipated. Currently supported by trees around it, so it hasn’t fallen onto the bridge. People can still pass safely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Main Street, Coberley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Unstable Slab FW ENWD 1 x 600mm x 450mm Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes still there even after 'Fix', 9th June
item.description:
On the A40 just before horse yard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Partially broken bough hanging at side of road, 9th June
item.description:
The partially broken bough (willow) is on the RHS of the lane, about 5-6 car lengths after having left the A4019. The bough split on Saturday 6-Jun in the severe winds and, at that point was blocking the lane. I was able to trim off the foliage so that has helped in the short term, however the bough is still hanging off the tree and could completely detach, which could then be a safety concern if someone was in the lane at the time. I have been unable to upload a photo to show you … it wouldn’t load, even after 25minutes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cooks Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 9th June
item.description:
FW abrupt level difference 600mm x 300mm x 31mm Give and take TM Outside number 9 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 9th June
item.description:
Unstable Slab FW 1 x 400mm x 400mm Tactile Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Stats required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 9th June
item.description:
PERM Please can a inquiry ref be raised for a Perm Repair for the Arbs Team Details are as follows: Previous Job Number: 42659813 Address: 3/156 Glebelands To Penhill Farm, Next To Wooden Fence, Colesbourne. USRN: 9400965 Job Description: Damaged Tree Branch made safe with Road Closure -Requires Arbs Team.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 9th June
item.description:
Pothole FW in hours 2hr Emergency 300mm x 300mm possible sink hole Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure MAKE SAFE ONLY ENQUIRY RAISED FOR AHR TO INVESTIGATE (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees/shrubs blocking footpath, 9th June
item.description:
Trees/shrubs are partly blocking the footpath on Fiddlers Green Lane from entrance to Meadow Close up to the mini roundabout with Telstar Way. Difficult for two people to pass each other satisfactorily without having to step off the pavement or avoid continuously parked cars along that side.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fiddlers Green Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree causing obstruction, 9th June
item.description:
Tree on cycle/pathway near B and Q entrance/exit is causing cyclists and walkers to duck under overhanging branches

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grovefield Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of tarmac missing, 9th June
item.description:
On the exit from GCHQ onto Telstar Way, partly covering the Give Way road markings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of tarmac missing, 9th June
item.description:
The area is on Telstar Way just outside GCHQ bus exit towards the junction with the A40, as you aproach the roundabout from Fiddlers Green Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
